FAST '27

25th USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies

February 23–25, 2027
Renton, WA, USA
Fall paper submissions due September 15, 2026

The 25th USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies (FAST '27) will take place on February 23–25, 2027, in Renton, WA, USA. FAST will bring together storage-system researchers and practitioners to explore new directions in the design, implementation, evaluation, and deployment of storage systems.

Interested in Participating? View the Call for Papers. Fall paper submissions are due on Tuesday, September 15, 2026.

Test of Time Award Nominations

Submit a nomination for the FAST Test of Time Award! The award honors FAST papers published 10+ years ago that have had a significant impact within our community of storage-system researchers and practitioners and beyond. Nominations received by December 14, 2026, will be considered for the 2027 award. Any nominations received after that date will be considered for future years.

Venue

Hyatt Regency Lake Washington
1053 Lake Washington Blvd. N
Renton, WA 98056
USA
+1 425.203.1234

Become a Sponsor

Request the sponsorship prospectus by emailing [email protected] with the conference name in your subject line to learn more.

The acceptance of any organization as a sponsor does not imply explicit or implicit approval by USENIX of the sponsoring organization’s values or actions. In addition, sponsorship does not provide any control over conference program content. Questions? Email [email protected].
